What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!


Stage 2
Route: Mayan San Remo
Date: March 16-23

Keep the prize wheels and bike wheels spinning as we move it over to Mayan San Remo for Stage 2.

name: Hercules - Breakfast Club
description:
Start your day right with the Breakfast Club — a super friendly and inclusive group ride on Zwift! We ride with the rubber band enabled, so no one gets dropped, and everyone stays together no matter the pace.

Expect great chat, good vibes, quizzes, fun facts and a welcoming atmosphere for all riders, whether you're new to Zwift or a seasoned pro.

Please join our Zwift Club at https://www.zwift.com/uk/clubs/d6581e47-deb2-46ed-a278-5777d5d2fd0f/home

Please join our Facebook Group at https://www.facebook.com/groups/2606407819659263/

Please join us online at https://herculesrunningandtri.com/

Please join us on Strava at https://www.strava.com/clubs/herculesrunningandtriclub

If you would like to own our famous Pink & Black Club Kit in real life, please order at https://tinyurl.com/herculestrirun

#jerseyunlock

name: Team Italy Sunday Long Run
description:
WELCOME TO ALL RUNNERS!
Join our “Team Italy Sunday Long Run“!
An excellent training to improve muscle oxygenation and your fitness level. The focus of the run is improve your endurance skills, at your own pace or with the leader, and obviously have fun. The pace will be between 5'00" and 4'30" min/km .
The Running Division of Team Italy is a new reality that is added to the already more acclaimed Bike Division. It was born from the passion between two runner friends, zwift users, and boss of Team, which we thanks. So, we hope you enjoy with us. Also in the other events, which you can find on our Facebook page. Please, add tag [ITA] after your name.
Stay connected with other runners via our Team Italy Discord Server (Running/Corsa Section - Audio Channel) https://discord.gg/c7PGKGv
This is the Facebook group of Team Italy Runners https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftrunningitaly/ , and Team Italy https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftitaly
Join us! Have fun! Run On!. #zwiftrunningitaly #teamitaly

Benvenuti a tutti i Runners !
Questa è la “Team Italy Sunday Long Run“!
Risvegliare la muscolatura e prepararla al meglio. Un ottimo allenamento per migliorare l’ossigenazione dei muscoli ed il proprio livello di fitness. Focus della corsa è migliorare le capacità endurance in gruppo con il Leader o al proprio passo ed ovviamente divertirsi. Il passo sarà compreso tra 5'00" and 4'30" min/km . La Divisione Running del Team Italy è una recente realtà aggiunta alla già acclamata divisione Cycling. Nata dalla passione di due amici runners, utenti Zwift, ed il Boss del Team Italy, che ringraziamo. Grazie anche a voi, ed alla vostra passione questa realtà sta crescendo e divenendo sempre più attiva. Per tutte le info necessarie potete trovare la nostra pagina Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftrunningitaly/ La pagina del Team Italy: https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftitaly ed il canale Discord, Running audio channel, per tenerci in contatto: https://discord.gg/c7PGKGv

name: NPRC - Run Every Day Powered By NoblePro
description:
Come and join the fastest growing running club on Zwift.  With a choice of 5 or 10k you can pick your distance. Whether you are a beginner or experienced runner come and join us, you can run at whatever pace you like, it’s not a race unless you want it to be!

Each day is a different route and as new routes are released the courses will change to allow you to bag that badge.

You will run in our in game NPRC jersey and if you complete the event you get to keep it to wear wherever you like.

We also hold special events where you can win an actual jersey to wear in real life.

NPRC Facebook – We have a facebook group where you can join and talk about all things running.  Share your stories and get help and advice.

https://www.facebook.com/groups/1223724692417314/

NoblePro: - We are a team focused on elevating running through our treadmills and digital platforms. We create treadmills loved by runners and the wider running community for quality engineered hardware features and advanced software integration to give you the freedom to train with the apps you love.
https://www.noble-pro.com/

Kinni:- In a fitness world where treadmill bluetooth integration can be a confusing place, we aim to provide you with the ability to effortlessly connect. You can run structured treadmill workouts, connect and integrate with your favourite bluetooth fitness apps such as Zwift, Rouvy, Kinomaps and many more. We are focused on progress and advancement in integration, connectivity and control.

name: Team Italy Endurance - Badge Hunting Ride
description:
🇮🇹
Andiamo alla conquista dei badge e/o percorsi più ambiti e difficili di zwift.
Il tutto realizzato in compagnia con due gruppi tarati su due ritmi diversi.
Tutti i gruppi si vedranno potrai quindi scegliere anche di cambiare ritmo durante la pedalata
Endurance Cat C - 2,0/2,5 W/kg avg (media evento)
Endurance Cat B – 2,8/3,0 W/kg avg (media evento)

🇬🇧
Let's go to conquer the most coveted and difficult Zwift badges and/or routes.
Select the preferred pace between the two available pens:
Endurance Cat C - 2,0/2,5 W/kg avg (for the whole event)
Endurance Cat B – 2,8/3,0 w/kg avg (for the whole event)
All the groups will see each other so you can start easy with C or spicy with B

This ride is inspired by the Saverio Addante's Sporting Exploit in ZWIFT and Irl: vEveresting, 1000kms in row and more others
Just sign up and join us.

—Discord: https://discord.gg/H6jKNJjzJQ
—Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftitaly

name: EVO CC Fat Burn/Steady State (2-5 -2.6wkg avg)
description:
Welcome to Evolution Cycling Club [EVO] Steady State Event 2-5-2.6WKG Average. Your co-operation and teamwork is essential to the success of the ride and we ask that all riders respect the pace set by the leader (Yellow Beacon). We may include intervals over and below the ride average advertised power range, but we will allow enough recovery and time to regroup after every effort. This is not a race, so please follow the leader beacon's (Yellow) instructions and if you are feeling strong we would welcome any help offered by stronger riders to bring any dropped riders back to the yellow beacon. We welcome good chat and a social atmosphere for new and experienced Zwifters alike, everyone is welcome.

#evo

name: Stage 3 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!

Stage 3
Route: Downtown Titans
Date: March 23-30


For Stage 3, we’re headed to Downtown Titans—it’s not called the Zwift Big Spin for nothing!

name: OTR Snap Crackle Pop Punch Time
description:
Snap Crackle Pop Punch Time is a group ride, race & interval training all rolled into one fun challenging event. Unique “race” scoring, where results in ZwiftPower are based on sum of segment times on a route with punchy climbs and/or sprints. Group rides together at ~2wkg, and ride leader provides guidance and lead-outs to smash a segment; then regroup, rinse & repeat. New route every week.

Multiple time slots on Fri-Sun, including Fri Atlantic, Sun APAC and Sun Americas/EMEA.
Riders need to join ZwiftPower.com to see their results as sum of segment times.

Event links: https://www.zwift.com/events/tag/snapcracklepop
Weekly results (across all time slots): https://zwiftpower.com/league.php?id=2656
In-ride conversation (“SCP Ride” channel): https://discord.gg/B52qdExaW2
Chat, banter and results: https://discord.gg/HNzvx98srF

Group ride with all cats together at ~2w/kg. Yellow beacon / ride leader (when present) will provide instructions for each segment, and drop the fence when it's time to punch/sprint. Fence is for guidance only (non-zapping).

Ride at a relaxed pace between the timed segments.
Work together to optimize draft for faster segment times.
Slow or stop with yellow beacon after each segment to regroup.

All categories start in a single pen.
Results split per WKG category in ZwiftPower.
No power ups, default drafting, no TT bikes.

One of our regular SCP routes is 3.5 laps of Innsbruckring, with 4x Leg Snappers plus 3x sprints (stopping to regroup on the kicker in between). The challenge is to achieve sub 4 mins for the sum of 7 segment times for cats A/B (that's 45 secs per snapper plus 20 secs per sprint), sub 5 mins for cat C, and sub 7 mins for cat D. Best time to beat is 3:33.
Historical results for Leg Snapper: https://zwiftpower.com/league.php?id=1322

name: GXY 100 [2.0-2.4WKG]  CAT HIGH D & [1.6-2.0WKG] CAT LOW D
description:
Welcome to GXY 100!

Each week we are doing a 100 – that could be riding 100km, 100 minutes or multiples of 100…. ☺

Jump on, settle in and respect the leader’s pace, instructions and the time will fly by!

GXY are blessed with world class sweepers, if you need a wheel at any point, shout early and our sweepers will be on hand to support.

GXY are a friendly and supportive club who strive to help others succeed.  We are looking forward to riding with you.

If you want to become a member and join our community to race, ride socially, or both, please come and join ideally via our Facebook link or by the email below:

name: SYN x RAD RACE Spin
description:
This ride is a special collaboration between Rad Race and The SYN, bringing the community together for a fun, social spin on Zwift. And yes — there’s a pretty sweet bonus: complete the ride and you’ll unlock the limited-edition Rad Race x SYN in-game Zwift kit. How cool is that?!

Weekends are made for riding together. Every Sunday, we meet on Zwift for a 90-minute community spin with good vibes, good wheels, and plenty of motivation. This is a C-category group ride, with the ride leader setting a steady pace of 2.5–3.2 w/kg on average, making it accessible while still engaging. The focus is on riding as a group, chatting, and enjoying the session — with a few fun sprints along the way to keep things lively. No structured interval blocks, no pressure — just a solid Sunday ride with the crew.

Jump in, meet the community, ask questions, and enjoy a relaxed but rewarding spin to wrap up your weekend on the bike.

name: KISS Racing 100
description:
WHAT IS CATEGORY ENFORCEMENT?

Category Enforcement will prevent Zwifters from entering a category they are not eligible for. Our goal is to increase fairness in racing.

HOW DOES IT WORK?

- Zwift checks a racer's past performance using VO2 max and FTP to determine their race category.
- Racers can join a category at or above their category. For example, if you are "C" category, you can race in C, B, or A category. You can not race in the D category.

Keep it Super Simple. Race hard and race fair.
Please use ZwiftPower's Minimum Category on your profile for race entry.
Cats A, and B will require a power source (power meter or smart trainer) and heart rate monitor.
Cat C will require power source (power meter or smart trainer) and heart rate monitor for podium spots.
Podium finishers in Cat A are expected to dual (power) record and to make analysis publicly available on ZwiftPower; they must also be using a direct drive trainer or power meter.
**Elite level performances are also expected to be supported by dual (power) recordings from reputable power sources or easily verifiable outside data. This applies to those with a history of such performances.
** 5.2 w/kg (20 mins); 6 w/kg (5 mins); 9.8 w/kg (1 min)
Zwift Activities must be saved publicly.
Please also maintain an open and active Strava profile to facilitate organiser inquiry.
Please see http://www.zwiftpower.com for more information on our races!

name: ZTPL Cycling Club Psycho Poranek
description:
Zapraszamy na wspólny poranny event z ZTPL Cycling Club.
Z założenia nasze jazdy prowadzą liderzy, którzy pomagają trzymać peleton w ryzach. Jeśli podczas eventu zabraknie lidera, starajcie się trzymać tempo na które się umówiliśmy w momencie gdy dołączyliście do wybranej grupy. To od Was zależy jak będziecie się bawić 😊
Po ukończonym evencie, jeśli jechaliście z nami pierwszy raz, w Waszym wirtualnym garażu będzie czekała nasza teamowa koszulka!

◾️ Wartości podane w opisach dotyczą średniego tempa z CAŁEJ jazdy (nie uwzględniają interwałów, które mogą wystąpić podczas np. podjazdów)
◾️ PAMIĘTAJCIE, że podczas jazd grupowych NIE UŻYWAMY ROWERÓW CZASOWYCH!
◾️ Starajcie się pilnować peletonu i nie zgubić koła, samemu bardzo trudno jest odrobić stratę.
◾️ Proszę słuchajcie poleceń lidera, które podczas jazdy wyświetlane są na środku ekranu. Szczególnie jeśli lider zauważy że grupa się porwała.
◾️ Lider, który prowadzi grupę podświetlony jest na żółto.
◾️ Starajcie się jechać blisko lidera, starając się go nie wyprzedzać i nie wyjeżdżać przed bramę, która informuje Was że jedziecie za szybko.

◾️Podoba się Wam to co robimy? Zawsze możecie postawić Waszym kochanym administratorom oraz liderom naszych jazd wirtualną kawę :) https://buycoffee.to/ztplcc
◾️Jeśli chcecie sprawić sobie już teraz naszą nową teamową koszulkę ZTPL Cycling Club zapraszamy bezpośrednio na stronę https://inoni.cc/?s=ztpl&post_type=product
◾️Cała gama naszych koszulek oraz informacje o kolejnych Pre-Orderach znajdziecie na https://ztpl.cc/stroje-ztpl-cc/
◾️Nasze casualowe koszulki znajdziecie u Wintertala: https://wintertal.com/pl/133-ztplcc

◾️Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ZwiftPolska
◾️Grupa na facebooku: Polska Społeczność Zwift https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwift.polska
◾️Instagram: #ZTPLCyclingClub https://www.instagram.com/ztpl.cc/
◾️Strava: https://www.strava.com/clubs/182377
◾️Nasz klub w Companionie: https://www.zwift.com/eu/clubs/ztplcc
◾️Nasze wszystkie klubowe jazdy: https://www.zwift.com/eu/events/tag/ztplcc
◾️Nasza strona internetowa: https://ztpl.cc/

#RideOn #ZTPLCC

[ENG]
Join us for a morning group ride with ZTPL Cycling Club!
Our rides are typically led by designated ride leaders who help keep the peloton in order. If, for any reason, a leader is not present during the event, please try to maintain the agreed pace of the group you joined.
It’s up to you how much fun you’ll have! 😊

◾️Please listen to the leader’s commands which are displayed in yellow during the whole ride. The leader who leads the group is highlighted in yellow. Please don’t pass the leader.
◾️Please follow the leader instructions! Especially if the leader notices that the group has been swept away. The leader is highlighted in yellow.

◾️If you would like to get yourself our ZTPL Cycling Club team jersey please visit our shop https://inoni.cc/en/?s=ztpl&post_type=product
or you can order our Casual T-Shirt and Hoodies https://wintertal.com/en/133-ztplcc

name: The Stampede Challenge by Herd Racing
description:
Join Herd Racing for our monthly TT challenge. For the month of January
it's 2 laps of Handful of Gravel. You can race this as many times as you'd
like and try to beat your time and your best time counts in the monthly
standings https://zwiftpower.com/league.php?id=3093

For these events drafting is turned off, so it's just you and the clock. Is
the gravel, the MTB or the TT bike fastest? Maybe even a road bike?!?!
Pick your fastest equipment and give it your best shot! Join us in the Herd
Racing League facebook or Discord server to chat pacing strategies, gear,
and more.
https://discord.gg/DrAXaCb7Tq

name: Rowe & King - Fire Breather
description:
This is a group ride, with a difference! It will be 80 minutes, with the final 10 minutes a free for all race to the last second! 

The format of the ride is as follows;
10 Minutes easy as a warm up
20 Minutes ramped effort, to 85% of FTP
5 Minutes easy
3 x (20s Max effort sprint - 3 Minutes easy)
20 Minutes ramp down from 85% of FTP
10 Minutes full gas race
5 Minutes cool down

About Rowe & King Coaching:

The Rowe & King team are highly experienced cyclists and qualified coaches. Whether your goals are to become a professional cyclist, gain a 2nd cat licence, complete a sportive, perform at a specific event or simply becoming a better bike rider with a healthier lifestyle Rowe & King are ready to help you become a better cyclist, whatever that may mean to you.

Launched in 2015 Rowe & King, which has since grown to a team of 11 who help riders improve and work towards achieving their goals.

About - Rowe & King (roweandking.com) https://roweandking.com/about-rowe-and-king-cycling-coaching

name: ZLDR AYOP Event
description:
Join Zwift Long-Distance Runners (ZLDR) run club for a nice AYOP (at your own pace) event. Whether you want to push for a new personal best, use it as part of your weekly training program or just enjoy a sociable event this is suitable for you.

ZLDR is a group of diverse people, from speed demons to walkers, from people just getting to their first 5k to ultra runners. We are here to support your running dreams and help you develop your running skills. We are a collective group of supportive and experienced runners and walkers who want to help you set and achieve new goals!

For more ZLDR fun and support, join our groups on social media platforms:

Facebook Group: https://www.facebook.com/groups/ZLDR2020
Strava Club: https://www.strava.com/clubs/zldr2020
Instagram page: https://www.instagram.com/zldr.2020/
Discord Invitation (not required for the run)
https://discord.com/invite/PuFctEnWyn
ZLDR website for Challenge Months: https://www.zldr.club
Online shop: https://www.sweatydino.com

name: Workout 2 - Zwift Camp: Breakthrough
description:
Outdoor miles are right around the corner, and these five Zwift Camp: Breakthrough workouts get you ready for them. Sharpen your speed, smooth your pedal stroke, and build the strength you need for hills and longer rides outside.

Workout 2: Body Control
This one’s got a little bit of everything: single-leg drills, hand positioning, and calm upper-body control are all on deck, keeping you confident and smooth from start to finish.

name: Stage 2: Pas Racing: Handful of Gravel
description:
The PAS Racing Gravel Series brings the spirit and style of Pas Normal Studios to gravel racing on Zwift. Across four stages, you’ll take on demanding routes in a series designed to be raced flat out. Get a shiny new gravel bike from the Drop Shop and let it rip!

Complete any stage to win a brand new Pas Normal Jersey!

Badges are out—XP is in. Every finish fuels your progress. Earn up to 2000 XP for completing the series, including a massive 1000 XP from Stage One.

Stage 1
Route: Jungle Circuit
Date: April 6–12

The series kicks off on the Jungle Circuit in Watopia.. Line up, find your rhythm, and open the PAS Racing Series strong.

Stage 2
Route: Handful of Gravel
Date: April 13–19

The challenge builds. Handful of Gravel rewards the right setup and steady power across demanding terrain. Upgrade your build, join the next start line, and keep the momentum rolling.

Stage 3
Route: Yumezi Grit
Date: April 20–26

A brand new gravel racing route on Zwift. Fresh terrain. New lines to chase. Take on Yumezi Grit, test yourself against the field, and experience competitive gravel at its best.

Stage 4
Route: Serpentine 8
Date: April 27 – May 3

One final chance to line up and close out the PAS Racing Series. Hard routes. Real racing. Finish it strong.

MONTHLY GC COMPETITION

Looking for extra motivation? The Monthly GC (General Classification) Competition lets you track your progress across all stages. Each race counts—your times add up throughout the series, shaping the overall standings. At the end of the month, the fastest total time takes the win!
VIEW RESULTS: https://www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/pasracing2026

—------------------

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that in order to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

name: LEQP Provence Badge Hunter Series
description:
Welcome to the L’Equipe Provence Badge Hunter Series! Our dedicated Team of Leaders and Sweepers created the concept of Zwift Badge Hunting and continue to refine, expand and perfect the art of the Hunt. Together, we share two goals: stacking badges and having fun! Whether this is your first time with us or you just want to tap into the contagious enthusiasm from a community of like-minded Zwifters, you’re in the right place. As a bonus, finish the Hunt and unlock the L’Equipe Provence Team Kit!

Teamwork makes the dreamwork! Stick together, use the group draft and encourage each other in the chat to get through these challenging rides. Group C will be between 2.5-3.2 w/kg and Group D will be between 2.0-2.5 wkg.

Visit our Team Shop:
https://jakroo.com/store-front?storeId=BJ2aA7Ay5#

Join our Facebook Group: https://www.facebook.com/groups/leqpprovencezwift/

Follow on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/lequipeprovence/

Turn It Up! Add your favorite track to our Spotify Playlist!: https://tinyurl.com/y5ocfckc

Chat on our Discord Channel: https://discord.gg/a8TCFft

name: 3R Endurance Steady Ride
description:
This is a 3R Group Ride Event. Your co-operation and teamwork is essential to the success of the ride and we ask that no riders ride off the front of the group. The event is designed as part of 3R’s package of #ProStyleTraining events to assist with the attainment of your training goals and may include intervals over and below the ride average parameters. This is not a race so please follow the leader beacon's (Yellow) instructions and if you are feeling strong, please help the keeper beacon (Red) to assist other riders back to the pack. We welcome good banter and aim to create a fun, social atmosphere for your training. We welcome any feedback on our Facebook page https://www.facebook.com/groups/ClubWorldBicycleRelief/ #Team3R #Ride3R #RideRaceRaise.

#3r

name: LGBTQz Ride with Pride
description:
Everyone is welcome to join LGBTQ Zwifters and friends as we Ride with Pride all
year round in our Sunday social ride!
Our yellow beacons aim to maintain an average social pace of around 1.6 - 1.8
W/Kg, and we encourage everyone to ride close to yellow and enjoy being part of
our rainbow blob. Please be aware that we frequently use the rubberband in our group rides. You can check the event details to see if this is the case for this ride by using the link 'Toggle Event Details' at the end of the event description on zwift.com. Ride leaders may have quizzes or other fun
stuff planned for you, so please do get involved using the companion app chat
function. Our rides are inclusive, we value diversity and courage, and we are always
respectful. Ride chat may involve LGBTQIA+ topics so please come with an open
heart and open mind.
If you want to learn more about what to expect on one of our rides, or find links to our
Club and socials, please visit: https://lgbtq-zwifters.com/

name: Hotchillee Race, Ride or Conquer Endurance ride
description:
The Hotchillee Race, Ride or Conquer ride is a series of Sunday morning endurance focussed races/rides that are a perfect way to get in a solid endurance session.

The routes will typically be in the 70-120 mins range but we might throw in some longer ones too.

The idea, just like a good sportive, is, no matter what your pace, you should find some wheels to ride with and, with double-draft enabled, should be able to hang on and tick that route off.

If you want a couple of spicy midweek rides, check out Hotchillee WOT (Watts on Tuesday) on Tuesdays at 1830 and the Hotchillee Gain Train at 1830 on Thursdays.

Check out Hotchillee IRL events and our community at *www.hotchillee.com*

Route Rota

Eastern Eight (51.7km/340m)
Dust in the Wind (52.1km/529m)
Petit Boucle (61km/431m)
Big Foot Hills (67.5km/707m)
Three Sisters (47.8km/879m)
Achterbahn (47.4km/973m)
The PRL Half (69km/954m)
Quatch Quest (45.9km/1683m)
The Pretzel (72.2km/1333m)
Volcano Circuit (25 laps)(105.3km/530m)
Four Horsemen (89.3km/2112m)

name: Stage 4 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!


Stage 4
Route: Southern Coast Cruise
Date: March 30 - April 6

Wrap up the Zwift Big Spin down on Southern Coast Cruise, with loads of prizes still on deck!

name: Bikealicious Endurance & Espresso
description: Endurance & Espresso is a relaxed but purposeful Sunday morning Zwift ride (We have the "rubber-band" activated, which allows you to ride at your own pace, slow or fast, and you are guaranteed to stay in the group), focused on steady endurance and good vibes. We’ll roll at a conversational pace, settle into aerobic zones, and shake out the legs while easing into the day—perfect for building fitness without burying yourself. All abilities welcome, and coffee talk strongly approved ☕🚴‍♂️.

name: Stanga Sunday Endurance
description:
Stanga Sunday Endurance is all about winter base miles in good company. Settle into Zone 2, find the bunch, and let the kilometres roll by as we build steady fitness together. Expect a smooth pace and good vibes only – perfect for stacking winter endurance or spinning the legs after a hard week.

Like this format? Join the Stanga Racing club on Zwift for our full weekly schedule of crits, punchy races, and endurance rides.

https://www.zwift.com/clubs/12f0e125-1fb8-4d78-8da2-b39efca4bffb/home

name: ZSUN Endurance Enhancer
description:
Get ready to boost your stamina in ZSUN’s Endurance Enhancer! This steady, longer-duration ride is perfect for building resilience and preparing for harder events or races.

Targeting a pace of 2.4–2.7 w/kg over ~120 minutes, it’s ideal for developing aerobic capacity while riding with a focused, supportive group.

🗓️
Sunday AM | 120 mins | ~2.4–2.7 w/kg

🎯
Focus on endurance development

🚴‍♀️
Suitable for mid to high-level social riders

🎁
Complete the ride to earn your ZSUN kit

Let’s push our limits together – one pedal stroke at a time!

name: Watts More To the Top!
description:
Watts More! Ride with friends in challenging events. Take on your challenge in Watts, elevation or duration! 

At Sunday morning we go To the top! A rideleader will guide you through the hills and mountains that Zwift has to offer. On the flats we will ride about 2.5 w/kg and on the climbs around 3.0 w/kg reflecting a C-category ride. All riders are encouraged to keep the bunch together, so we can start and finish as one happy blob. During the season we build up the elevation meters. 

From October until March these rides are guided with a rideleader. From April until September the rides are without rideleader. In that case don’t argue, blob up and be nice.  
 
Check out our weekly ride announcements on the Watts More Facebook page https://www.facebook.com/groups/1151203888657006/?ref=share 

 Join Watts More on Zwift  https://www.zwift.com/clubs/d6afeaa7-e754-478a-b68d-2a794648fa02/home  

 
Other Watts More events: 
Build more Watts! (C) 2.5-3.0 W/kg, Tuesday 19.00 CET  
Different Watts! (D) 2.2-2.4 W/kg, Thursday 19.00 CET 
Rendurance! (C) 2.2-2.6 W/kg, Saturday 9.00 AM CET

name: ZU4R eSport Masochist Climber
description:
ZU4R Sportswear has the pleasure to invite you to the ZU4R eSport Masochist Climber series 2022. Here we will challenge, cheer on, support and put each other in competition, in a series of climbs up the Alpe du Zwift – Road to Sky.

In addition to the community, we have the following badges as objectives:
• Avid Climber: Climb the Alpe 5 times
• Masochist: Climb the Alpe 25 times
• Lift Off: Finish Alpe in under an hour
And of course - the climbing wheels: Lightweight Meilenstein, which you can get on the wheel of fortune at the top of AdZ. Collecting altitude meters for the Zwift Consept bike Z1 (Tron) bike can also be a goal for those who do not have this bike.

More information about ZU4R eSport: https://www.zu4resport.com
We use the Voice channel "Masochist Climber» at ZU4R eSport Discord-server: https://discord.gg/RMVde96aqb

Welcome – ride together – RIDE ON 👍

name: Het is Koers in the Dutch mountains
description:
Het is Koers, the famous Dutch cycling blog presents you a variety of social rides. At Sunday morning we go "in the Dutch Mountains"
Between 1st Sunday of October until the last Sunday of March, we will offer you a medium paced endurance ride with social characteristics.
Meaning a ride leader will guide you through the hills and mountains that Zwift has to offer. All riders are encouraged to keep the bunch together, so we can start and finish as one happy blob.
On the flats we will ride about 2.5 w/kg and on the climbs around 3.0 w/kg reflecting a C-category ride.

Between 1st Sunday of April until last Sunday of September HIK presents you with a variety of free rides (no lead) through the Dutch mountains. On weekly basis you can ride with other C-category riders, wanting to ride uphill.
Check out our weekly ride announcements on the HIK Facebook https://www.facebook.com/groups/hetiskoers
Join Het Is Koers on Zwift https://www.zwift.com/clubs/HetIsKoers/home
Other HIK events:
Watts More! (C) 2.5-3.0 W/kg, Tuesday 19.00 CET
Something Different! (D) 2.2-2.3 W/kg, Thursday 19.15 CET
Weekend Starter! (D) 1.7-2.2 W/kg and (C) 2.3-2.8 W/kg, Friday 19.30 CET
Endurance Recovery! (C) 2.2-2.6 W/kg, Saturday 9.00 AM CET

name: PAOLO BARBERA & SCANNELLATORI SERIALI WORKOUT
description:
"Scannellatori Seriali" is a large community of cyclists, triathletes, and runners. We invite you to join our community by following our Instagram page at https://www.instagram.com/scannellatori_seriali/ or contacting us on Facebook.
 
Coach Paolo Barbera (Please visit www.heycoach.it )   is a Certified Triathlon and Ironman Coach and the founder of Active Kids, a sporting clinic to help children and adults in the prevention and treatment of obesity through healty nutrition and tailored training programs

Paolo is an experienced thriathlete and cyclist, in 2017 opened an endurance training center in milan, Tri60, specilized in indoor training.

In the last ten years Paolo has developed training programs for triathletes, runners and cyclists. Indoor training plays a key role to control pace, cadence and mental strenght.

Paolo’s workouts are designed to mix different training zones aiming to maximize results in a very short time. Paolo’s coachees by following his workouts, at the right intensity, have achieved challenging results.

name: PACK Run: Smile for Miles
description:
PACK Run Smile for Miles is the answer to how to start your Sunday the right way. We will usually run one lap of a short route and then offer an after party for whatever distance you desire. Come for the banter, the confections, and smiles and leave with a sense of accomplishment and community. https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftpack/
#StrongerTogether #MaythePackBewithYou

name: Zwift Epic Race - Coastal Crown Loop
description:
Join us as we take on some slightly more challenging race routes!

For more Epic Races, please join the club on the Companion App: https://www.zwift.com/clubs/a1ea0324-7f4a-46a7-8547-a7a3246e349b/home

All racers will start together, so make sure you're ready at the start!

WHAT IS ZWIFTPOWER? 
For further information on connecting to ZwiftPower, check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H 

Please note: For your results to show up in ZwiftPower, you must use a heart rate monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter. 

Check out zwift.com/racing for more information on how you can participate in other events offered by Zwift and the community to have a great racing experience.

#zwiftofficial

name: Workout 2 - Zwift Camp: Breakthrough
description:
Outdoor miles are right around the corner, and these five Zwift Camp: Breakthrough workouts get you ready for them. Sharpen your speed, smooth your pedal stroke, and build the strength you need for hills and longer rides outside.

Workout 2: Body Control
This one’s got a little bit of everything: single-leg drills, hand positioning, and calm upper-body control are all on deck, keeping you confident and smooth from start to finish.

name: Vikings Valhalla Sunday Skaal ride
description:
Welcome to the Vikings Valhalla Sunday Skaal ride. 

We would love to have you join us to toast a ride together to end the week. Our rides are very inclusive with a ‘’no one gets dropped’’ approach. We encourage riders to respect the leader's pace and ride with the yellow beacon. This is NOT A RACE! Stronger riders are encouraged to fall back and help sweep the riders struggling in the back. If you are looking for a fun ride with lots of Skaal this is the perfect ride for you.

Come and try us..

For more information about our rides go to: https://www.facebook.com/groups/503388660165279/

name: Norwegian Watts Club Endurance Ride
description:
Welcome to Norwegian Watts Endurance Ride
When it’s getting cold and wet outside, it’s time to get inside and get the hours in. Join us for a chill
and kind spirited century ride. You don’t have to stay for the whole ride, but all finishers will be
rewarded our awesome jersey.
The aim is to keep the group together, chatting and having
fun. This is a group ride, not a race!
Pace 1,7-2,0 w/kg
The ride leader will aim to ride mid parameters, but there might be slight variations above or below
the average during the ride.
NB: Please always respect

name: SZR Groupworkouts by Aktivitus
description:
These WOs are designed to give you improved aerobic development and increased aerobic threshold (LT1) -endurance - in a 2h workout. To get most out of this session, make sure your FTP is correct set. If you are aerobic underdeveloped for cycling you may need to decrease your FTP-settings.

The workout is 120min and starts with a 15min warmup. First main block is 3x15min at a controlled threshold/Sweet spot (90% of FTP) on lower cadences to wear us down and to get a time effective local aerobic development and cycling strength (endurance).

The second block contains 20x30/60sek intervals. 30sec at 150% of FTP with a 1min active rest. This is highly anaerobic which gives us an improved lactic tolerance and an increased anaerobic stanima. However, in a worn-out state these intervals will also stress your aerobic development. That means you oxygen transport into your working muscles will get better. Your endurance will thereby increase.

This WO is designed Johan Hasselmark at Aktivitus (www.aktivitus.se). Aktivitus runs Swedens leading test and coaching operations for endurance sports.
Johan Hasselmark is an international level adventure racer and extreme triathlete with several wins, 30 years of competative experince in endurance sports and 8 years of coaching and physiological testing.

name: Stage 2: Pas Racing: Handful of Gravel
description:
The PAS Racing Gravel Series brings the spirit and style of Pas Normal Studios to gravel racing on Zwift. Across four stages, you’ll take on demanding routes in a series designed to be raced flat out. Get a shiny new gravel bike from the Drop Shop and let it rip!

Complete any stage to win a brand new Pas Normal Jersey!

Badges are out—XP is in. Every finish fuels your progress. Earn up to 2000 XP for completing the series, including a massive 1000 XP from Stage One.

Stage 1
Route: Jungle Circuit
Date: April 6–12

The series kicks off on the Jungle Circuit in Watopia.. Line up, find your rhythm, and open the PAS Racing Series strong.

Stage 2
Route: Handful of Gravel
Date: April 13–19

The challenge builds. Handful of Gravel rewards the right setup and steady power across demanding terrain. Upgrade your build, join the next start line, and keep the momentum rolling.

Stage 3
Route: Yumezi Grit
Date: April 20–26

A brand new gravel racing route on Zwift. Fresh terrain. New lines to chase. Take on Yumezi Grit, test yourself against the field, and experience competitive gravel at its best.

Stage 4
Route: Serpentine 8
Date: April 27 – May 3

One final chance to line up and close out the PAS Racing Series. Hard routes. Real racing. Finish it strong.

MONTHLY GC COMPETITION

Looking for extra motivation? The Monthly GC (General Classification) Competition lets you track your progress across all stages. Each race counts—your times add up throughout the series, shaping the overall standings. At the end of the month, the fastest total time takes the win!
VIEW RESULTS: https://www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/pasracing2026

—------------------

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that in order to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

name: ZZRC Wacky Chase
description:
Welcome to ZZRC's Wacky Chase! 

Get ready to saddle up for an unforgettable adventure that combines pace, fun, and a dash of friendly competition! Our group rides are open to all riders, and we've constructed a delightful three-paced category to ensure everyone can enjoy a safe and top-notch experience on two wheels.

Here’s the game plan: we’ve divided our crew into three spirited teams. Team B will zoom at a snappy 3-3.5 pace, Team C will enjoy a smooth cruise at 2.5-3, while Team D will take it easy at 2-2.5. But wait, it gets even better! We’re throwing in a twist of excitement with a hot chase
. Team D takes off first from the pen, followed swiftly by Team C, and then... BANG! Team B sets off on the chase to catch both teams! 

This isn’t just another group ride; it’s your ticket to banter, camaraderie, and a good ol’ time! Our leaders will guide you, sharing pacing tips and tricks along the way. Remember, teamwork makes the dream work, so use that draft to your advantage as you barrel through the ride together!

A couple of quick housekeeping notes: we’re keeping the atmosphere all-inclusive and relaxed, with a focus on enjoyment rather than perfection. Sweeps and Ride Buddies will be off-duty this time, so if you find yourself lagging behind, feel free to continue at your own pace or buddy up with fellow riders nearby.

And hey, we’ve got a little rule: leave the TT Bikes at home! They don’t draft well and might make you puff and pant a bit more than you want. Mountain bikes? They’re welcome too, just be prepared to push a little harder than the folks on road bikes. No worries if you hit a snag; our 30-minute late join feature will let you teleport back to the main group with the magical YELLOW BEACON!

We’re all about chatting and having fun while we ride, so don’t miss out on our dedicated Discord channel! Join us, choose your pace, and get ready to share the laughs as we roll.

**Top Tips for Wacky Chase Success:**
1. Stick close to your ride leader; don’t let that gap turn into a canyon!
2. Avoid the fence—we want you in one piece, not fried!
3. Most importantly... HAVE FUN! This is all about the adventure. 

Don’t forget to connect with us on our ZZRC Facebook page and join the club on the companion app for all the latest gossip and rides!

So get your cycling gear on , bring your best vibes, and let’s hit the Zwift Roads together! 

Discord Channel
https://discord.com/channels/1009379476041383946/1009388181269004289

name: TEZH Racing | Cuerpo Escombro
description:
¿Con ganas de desafío? Únete a nuestra ruta del Domingo y siempre tendrás un desafío que realizar.

Disfruta de buena compañía en la social de los Domingos. Si quieres poner un ritmo alto, seguro que alguien te perseguirá, pero si prefieres ir charlando y tranquilo, entra en nuestro canal de Discord y pasa una buena mañana en compañía.

name: Stage 2: Pas Racing: Handful of Gravel || Advanced
description:
The PAS Racing Gravel Series brings the spirit and style of Pas Normal Studios to gravel racing on Zwift. Across four stages, you’ll take on demanding routes in a series designed to be raced flat out. Get a shiny new gravel bike from the Drop Shop and let it rip!

Complete any stage to win a brand new Pas Normal Jersey!

Badges are out—XP is in. Every finish fuels your progress. Earn up to 2000 XP for completing the series, including a massive 1000 XP from Stage One.

Stage 1
Route: Jungle Circuit
Date: April 6–12

The series kicks off on the Jungle Circuit in Watopia.. Line up, find your rhythm, and open the PAS Racing Series strong.

Stage 2
Route: Handful of Gravel
Date: April 13–19

The challenge builds. Handful of Gravel rewards the right setup and steady power across demanding terrain. Upgrade your build, join the next start line, and keep the momentum rolling.

Stage 3
Route: Yumezi Grit
Date: April 20–26

A brand new gravel racing route on Zwift. Fresh terrain. New lines to chase. Take on Yumezi Grit, test yourself against the field, and experience competitive gravel at its best.

Stage 4
Route: Serpentine 8
Date: April 27 – May 3

One final chance to line up and close out the PAS Racing Series. Hard routes. Real racing. Finish it strong.

MONTHLY GC COMPETITION

Looking for extra motivation? The Monthly GC (General Classification) Competition lets you track your progress across all stages. Each race counts—your times add up throughout the series, shaping the overall standings. At the end of the month, the fastest total time takes the win!
VIEW RESULTS: https://www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/pasracing2026

—------------------

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that in order to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

eventSubgroups.name: Stage 2: Pas Racing: Handful of Gravel || Advanced (A)

name: Foudre Sunday Coffee Ride
description:
Sortie dominicale Foudre : Foudre Sunday Coffee Ride

INTRO
La Team Foudre vous propose de venir évacuer les toxines de Mirabelle de la vieille, de passer un moment ensemble pour peaufiner votre endurance, et s'amuser lors des sprints pour les plus valeureux.
Lors de cette sortie plus longue, nous arpenterons des parcours variés et plus longs. Il s’agit d’une sortie de groupe conviviale et non d’une course, n’hésitez pas à venir nous rejoindre sur le canal vocal général sur le Discord.

DETAILS
Durée : 1h30 mais vous pourrez poursuivre et boucler le parcours si vous n’avez encore débloqué le badge du parcours
Join-Late : Activé
Déblocage du maillot Foudre : Oui, à condition d'être toujours dans l'évènement lorsque celui-ci se termine

GROUPES
2 groupes de niveau :
- LEADER (jaune) environ 2,5 w/kg (2,5 à 3,0 dans les montées)
- SWEEPER (rouge) environ 2,2 w/kg. (2,5 à 3,0 dans les montées) »

REGROUPEMENT
Nous essayons après chaque difficulté de faire en sorte que les groupes se reforment autour des leaders.
Rester donc près de votre leader pour éviter d’être distancé et vous retrouver seul. Si vous êtes lâchés, n’hésitez pas à prévenir au plus tôt (sur discord ou par message sur Zwift) pour se regrouper ou trouver d'autres coureurs pour vous regrouper.

Pour profiter au maximum de la sortie, rejoins nous sur le discord Foudre et notamment sur l'audio via l'oreillette : https://discord.gg/YzcVYJY

#TeamFoudre #jerseyunlock

name: Flanders Endurance Race
description:
Prepare your racing and climbing skills for the Flanders Endurance Race League.
This league are open races (held on Sunday) build on stamina. Races will be longer dan 2 hours.
Please note the race is from the gun, including any event 'warm-up' on the lap counter. Categories will all start together.

RACE RULES

No powerups.
No TT bikes.
Heart rate monitors are compulsory for "all" categories.
Power Meter and Smart Trainer winners take category win.
zPower riders will not be included in zwiftpower results

Riders must opt-in to ZwiftPower for official results via their Zwift profile settings @ https://my.zwift.com/profile/connectionsOpens a new window
Riders must register an account @ www.zwiftpower.comOpens a new window and agree to the T&C's to be included in official results.
Riders going over 5w/kg at 95% of 20 minute power will be removed from results.
Riders going over 6w/kg for 5 minute power will be removed from results.
Official results located @ www.zwiftpower.comOpens a new window

It is essential that all participants are honest and select the correct pen/category below which correlates to their current/potential FTP. (Please use your FTP divided by your weight in kg to select the correct category below.) Riders that have at least 3 ZP results (in their race history) on a higher FTP category level than the chosen one will be DQ'd ! If you're in doubt, please contact the organizer for more information.

NOTE : if you have a ZP cat tag lower than your W/kg FTP due to low body weight choose your FTP cat ! Example : Rider with an FTP of 4.5 W/kg but a B tag on ZP because of <250W will race A and not B !
The organizer can DQ riders when in doubt of performance and awaiting the correct info of the rider, the rider has to contact the organizer to discuss this matter.

CATEGORIES

(A) 4.0 W/kg FTP or higher
(B) 3.2 W/kg to 3.99 W/kg FTP
(C) 2.5 W/kg to 3.19 W/kg FTP
(D) Under 2.49 W/kg FTP

BZR homepage : https://www.facebook.com/BelgianZwiftRiders.BZR/Opens a new window

Our BZR stream Channels :
https://www.twitch.tv/tsbikerOpens a new window
https://www.youtube.com/user/TSbiker10Opens a new window
https://www.facebook.com/BZRECYCLINGTVOpens a new window

Spotify playlist : BZRcc FTP motivator

name: Zwift TT Club Racing - ZG25 Climb Champs
description:
The Time Trial. Cycling’s true leveler - just you and your legs versus everyone else in the field.

Come join Zwift TT Club on Zwift for more Time Trial event information! https://www.zwift.com/clubs/b3d1a903-df49-44eb-9c6f-4ba9f0622efe/home

Join us as we embark on a five-week series of events - each week you will have multiple chances to set your best time on the same route!

Over the course of the five weeks, we’ll be increasing the distance of the events.

Check out Zwiftpower.com after your event to see how well you stack up against the competition!

Don’t forget to check you’re using the fastest bike frame and wheels available to you!

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? 
For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H 

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

name: T-VGN 🌱 Smoothie
description:
Jump on for a social spin with a global team of vegan cycling enthusiasts who share the passion of the indoor cycling e-sport while living a compassionate, plant-based lifestyle.

Our events are open for everyone, vegan and non-vegan. You will find us chatty, supportive and encouraging. Feel free to ask if you have questions but most importantly - enjoy the ride!

name: Giant Camden Tron Hunters – get closer to the Tron
description:
The ultimate Zwift reward, the Zwift Concept Bike (aka Tron) takes a lot of effort to acquire; you have to climb 50,000mts of elevation to get your hands on this prize. Team Giant Camden organizes weekly rides around the hilliest routes to rack up elevation and give you a good endurance ride, so this is the perfect opportunity if you’re hunting for the Tron or some of the toughest route badges on Zwift and want some company.

**This is not a race** but some riders will go full steam, the majority of us will be taking a steady ride and chat in game. Find riders around your ability and share the work.

**Don’t forget to have the Everest Challenge selected before joining: https://zwiftinsider.com/tron-bike/ **

name: Stage 1 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!

Stage 1
Route: Flat Out Fast
Date: March 16-22

The adventure kicks off on Flat Out Fast—where the name of the game is no hills and Big Spin prizes galore!

name: WKG PROGRESSION RIDERS
description:
IMPORTANT - READ BELOW:
A fully original Zwift format built around 8 stages per season.
Social ride with a competitive edge.
⸻
PR LIVES ON ProgressionRiders.Club — JOIN THE GROUP
All chat and questions live here:
• https://discord.gg/2vYXgYzgvJ
Ride voice channel:
• https://discord.gg/ZhVdwkJH8w
⸻
THE JERSEY GAME
PR is about moments, not only raw watts.
* Green – sprints
* Red – climbs
* Yellow – all-rounder points

Miss the moment — miss the jersey.
⸻
SEASON FORMAT
Each season = 8 stages with leaderboards
Every stage favors a different rider type:
Sprinteur · Rouleur · Puncheur · Grimpeur
⸻
RIDE FORMAT (FAST)
• D group starts 3 min before C
(The Development Team)
Read the objectives on Discord or in the rulebook
• C starts 2 min before B
• B & C chases for the stage multiplier
• After the catch, B & C rides together
• Only advertised segments are contested
⸻
WATCH THE STAGE BRIEF
https://progressionriders.club/

Takes 1 minute. You will want an overview.

Join the WKG Club on:
• https://www.facebook.com/share/g/1DMqBvjGV1/?mibextid=wwXIfr
⸻
You don’t just ride PR.
You play it.

name: Flanders Coffee Ride
description:
Join us Flandriens at this moderate paced group ride. It’s a 2-2.5 w/kg group ride, it’s not a race. It's all about being social and enjoying the ride, there are no results displayed. Stay with the leader, enjoy the scenery and ride and work on your fitness ... help out other riders when needed and keep this group together as it's so much more fun !

Please follow the LEADER’s instructions and make it pleasant for "all" participants !
Late joining is possible ...

name: Zwift Crit Racing Club - Volcano Circuit CCW
description:
It's Crit time! Come and join in the fun on a number of multi-lap short routes. Get ready to dig deep and push to the finish line!

What is Racing Score?

Racing Score is an intuitive system that replaces the traditional categories (A - D) with a 0-1000 scale to reflect your current level, considering various metrics like race performances and power. This score helps Zwift recommend the most competitive band to race in, ensuring a fun, rewarding, and exciting experience as you track your progression throughout your Zwift racing adventures.

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

name: Le Ride Famille en bleu
description:
Le mode élastique favorise la cohésion au sein du groupe, permettant à chacun d’exprimer pleinement ses compétences. Ainsi, les défis ne deviennent plus des obstacles, mais plutôt des occasions de partage convivial et de plaisir collectif, transformant l’effort en une expérience enrichissante.

Discutez sur Discord /  Discuss on Discord: https://discord.gg/HgFb6SThT
Notre Facebook: https://m.facebook.com/groups/907351331715445

"Please add “(Gang)” at the end of your username in your Zwift profile.   Merci de mettre (Gang) à la fin de votre pseudo dans votre profil zwift 
"
Ruberband mode encourages group cohesion, allowing everyone to fully express their abilities.      Challenges are no longer obstacles, but opportunities for friendly sharing and collective enjoyment, turning effort into a truly rewarding experience.

name: Frenchy Fuzion Fondo
description:
Warm welcome to our Sunday Frenchy Fuzion Fondo, to take place each week on differents places.

We hill haunt Watopia and all worlds for 2h30, sometimes trying to get badge, mostly for the pleasure !

name: Compass Community Sunday Quiz Ride
description:
Looking to build endurance without watching the clock? This social group ride is the perfect way to make 90 minutes fly by.

We roll through two 30-minute intervals, each with a 30-second push at the start and end—just enough to add some spice without breaking the flow. But the real magic? The random quiz of the day. It’s the perfect excuse for great chat, friendly banter, and a few unexpected laughs while we pedal. Before you know it, you’re deep into the ride, your legs are ticking over, and the session is nearly done.

⚠️ Important note
• This is a social group ride, not a coached training session.
• Everyone rides at their own pace and you join at your own risk. Please ride within your personal limits and listen to your body.
• The leader and club are volunteers and accept no responsibility for injury, illness, or equipment issues arising from participation.

Ride. Quiz. Have fun. See you on the virtual road!

name: DBR Social Ride
description:
Join Danish Bike Riders on our weekly Social Ride. We will be riding at an average pace of 30-35km for 60min, mostly flat routes, but some routes are faster than others. We ride without the Fence, and perhaps also a bit different from many other Social Rides. RideLeader will keep a steady pace, but its ok to ride ahead and join other riders in front - Just remember to be Social. If you find yourself at the back, please call for a wheel, and we will try to get you back to the RideLeaders group. Stronger riders are as always welcome to help at the back. We look forward to ride with you.

Info on events and the [DBR] team can be found on “Danish Bike Riders” on FaceBook (English) https://www.facebook.com/DanishBikeRiders and in our group “Danish Bike Riders” https://www.facebook.com/groups/1160541327367604/ 

Ride On

#dbr

name: Cyclo BlaBla Ghost Team
description:
FRANÇAIS :
CYCLO-BLABLA – Tous les dimanches !
Rejoins-nous chaque dimanche pour le Cyclo-BlaBla !
Départ à 9h55, toutes catégories confondues, pour un minimum de 50 km… mais souvent beaucoup plus, jusqu’à 100 km ou plus !
Un classement scratch et un classement par catégorie seront publiés à la fin.
Alors, qui aura le courage d’aller jusqu’au bout ?
Tous les événements Ghost Team ici : https://www.zwift.com/uk/events/tag/ghost
Plus d’infos sur notre équipe : https://www.zwifteur.com/ghost-team
Viens pédaler, discuter et partager un moment convivial sur Zwift !
ENGLISH :
CYCLO-BLABLA – Every Sunday!
Join us every Sunday for Cyclo-BlaBla!
Start at 9:55 AM, all categories together, for at least 50 km… but often much more, up to 100 km or beyond!
A general ranking and a category ranking will be published at the end.
So, who will have what it takes to make it to the finish?
All Ghost Team events here: https://www.zwift.com/uk/events/tag/ghost
Learn more about our team: https://www.zwifteur.com/ghost-team
Come ride, chat, and enjoy a friendly moment on Zwift!

name: KIRCHMAIR Sunday Breakfast Ride
description:
Welcome to the KIRCHMAIR Sunday Breakfast Ride!

This is a relaxed 2 hour 2.0w/kg ride that we do every Sunday morning. It's also a perfect ride for new Zwifters starting to ride longer distances. From April to October there is not always a leader. Please organize the group yourself.

name: Pride Run
description:
Join with members of the LGBTQ+ community as we stride with Pride! 

Runs are hosted by LGBTQ Zwifters Club and we invite you to join our weekly rainbow run! In some runs you will find a leader to make it social and help keep you motivated. If you are in training for a duathlon or triathlon, you can even join a Pride Ride before your run, since runs are scheduled 30 min after each Pride ride ends. Our runs are inclusive, we value diversity and courage, and we are always respectful. Social chat may involve LGBTQ+ topics so please come with an open heart and open mind. 

If you want to learn more about our Club and socials, please visit: https://lgbtq-zwifters.com/

name: WELCOME TO THE BRAUNSTEIN CYCLING CLUB DANISH GROUP RIDE
description:
This is a social group workout; a chance every week for members to get together from around the globe, ride, chat and support each other - it’s run as a group workout session with ‘keep everyone together’ enabled so no matter what your pace you’ll stay in the pack - it’s not a race or competition and open for anyone to join us.

WHO IS THE BCC?

The BRAUNSTEIN Cycling Club (BCC) is, as the name suggests, Braunstein brewery’s Cycling Club. The BCC is a danish social Cycling club were we share our passion for Cycling.

For more information head to: www.braunstein.dk/bcc2

RIDE LEADERS

The rides are led by our friendly team of member ride leaders. The Leader (who has a yellow beacon over their head) will ride at a steady pace as set by the workout session. On most occasions we will have a support ride leader (who will also have a beacon), the ride leaders are there to help support you and keep the banter going - to join the chat use the Zwift Companion smartphone app.

Map/Route — Wattopia
Distance/Time/Laps — 1 hour
Type of Event - Group Ride
ABOUT GROUP WORKOUTS

Zwifters line up in the starting area just like a normal event and once the event starts, workout mode begins. Everyone stays together regardless of power output. Only if you stop pedaling and fall 6 meters behind the group will the rubber-banding stop.

eventSubgroups.name: WELCOME TO THE BRAUNSTEIN CYCLING CLUB DANISH GROUP RIDE (E)

name: Run 10K Every Day Powered By NoblePro
description:
Come and join the longest running daily led running event on Zwift. This was the event that kickstarted the NoblePro Running Club in support of a world record attempt at consecutive daily10k runs.
The event has a healthy group of leaders who are friendly and chatty and will help you achieve your goal, not matter your experience. Feel free to join in the chat and become addicted like we all are.

Whether you are a beginner or experienced runner come and join us, you can run at whatever pace you like, it's not a race.
If you don't want to run 10k then come along for as long as you wish, the support is always appreciated.
The event runs at the same time each day, each day of the week there is a different course.

NoblePro: - We are a team focused on elevating running through our treadmills and digital platforms. We create treadmills loved by runners and the wider running community for quality engineered hardware features and advanced software integration to give you the freedom to train with the apps you love.
https://www.noble-pro.com/

Kinni:- In a fitness world where treadmill bluetooth integration can be a confusing place, we aim to provide you with the ability to effortlessly connect. You can run structured treadmill workouts, connect and integrate with your favourite bluetooth fitness apps such as Zwift, Rouvy, Kinomaps and many more. We are focused on progress and advancement in integration, connectivity and control.
https://kinni.co/

https://kinni.co/devices/ - To see if your treadmill is compatible to link to Zwift.

Join the NoblePro Running Club (NPRC) - https://www.zwift.com/clubs/e7829ccd-bce4-4244-9ccf-4cdc3ef148ff/home

eventSubgroups.name: Run 10K Every Day Powered By NoblePro (E)

name: Workout 2 - Zwift Camp: Breakthrough
description:
Outdoor miles are right around the corner, and these five Zwift Camp: Breakthrough workouts get you ready for them. Sharpen your speed, smooth your pedal stroke, and build the strength you need for hills and longer rides outside.

Workout 2: Body Control
This one’s got a little bit of everything: single-leg drills, hand positioning, and calm upper-body control are all on deck, keeping you confident and smooth from start to finish.

name: Zwift Riders Scotland Sunday Club Ride
description:
Scottish people are mad about cycling and keen to provide exciting and fun rides.
Please see our ride descriptions below to give you options to join us.

eventSubgroups.name: Zwift Riders Scotland Sunday Club Ride (C)
eventSubgroups.description:
In Scottish summer we might not have leaders available for this ride. Pls try to ride at the Cat descriptions anyway. Come join some daft Scottish people passionate about Zwift cycling. We ride for an hour every Sunday morning on our weekly social Club ride. Often to exercise, sometimes just to sober up. We ride in various group. This is group C.

Although this is not really a race, it will in true Zwift tradition maybe get a bit spicy. This ride is not always led by members or our club, so we encourage anyone to join and test each other out with the average power numbers set for the group. 

When in place a leader and sweeper will try to keep the group together matching the reasonable effort at the front and encouraging others to help the sweeper with those at the back. We might do some wee tests or sprints or little races to the lamppost if we/you feel like it. Please chat via messaging, but we have a discord channel for you to use for the banter if you want. If for some reason you can’t make the start time, late joining is available up to 30mins post. 

Please use our "Sunday Club Ride" Discord voice channel here:  https://discord.com/channels/731107240987197461/1329849513313042463

eventSubgroups.name: Zwift Riders Scotland Sunday Club Ride (D)
eventSubgroups.description:
In Scottish summer we might not have leaders available for this ride. Pls try to ride at the Cat descriptions anyway. Come join some daft Scottish people passionate about Zwift cycling. We ride for an hour every Sunday morning on our weekly social Club ride. Often to exercise, sometimes just to sober up. We ride in various group. This is group D.

It’s a group ride so it’s not a race.  All abilities are welcome, but we’ll be tootling along at between 1.5 to 2.2. That’s where the banners will be but if you fancy shooting ahead on the day you are very welcome. You might miss the craic, but you won’t get removed. We might do some wee tests or sprints or little races to the lamppost if we/you feel like it. If you’re way ahead by then you might miss something fun. 

The leader and sweeper will try to keep the group together matching the reasonable effort at the front and encouraging others to help the sweeper with those at the back. We will chat via messaging, but we have a discord channel for you to use for the banter if you want. If for some reason you can’t make the start time, late joining is available up to 30mins post. 

Please use our "Sunday Club Ride" Discord voice channel here: https://discord.com/channels/731107240987197461/1329850433962770657

eventSubgroups.name: Zwift Riders Scotland Sunday Club Ride (E)
eventSubgroups.description:
In Scottish summer we might not have leaders available for this ride. Pls try to ride at the Cat descriptions anyway. Come join some daft Scottish people passionate about Zwift cycling. We ride for an
hour every Sunday morning on our weekly social Club ride - often to exercise,
sometimes just to sober up. 

Group E is a very steady group ride, no way is it a race.  We’re here to encourage
beginners and recovering riders to come ride in a group. We’ll be going at between
1.0 and 1.5 watts/kilo, it’s no drop. 

The Lead and Sweep banners will riding around these power levels but if you want to go on ahead you are welcome, you might miss the chat and the socialising.  You won’t get removed by riding through the red fence of doom. We might add in some sprints or hill climbs but we will try to re-establish the blob when these are over.  If you fall behind, the sweep or helper will try to drop back to offer a wheel with the intention of trying to help you rejoin the main group or just to keep you company if that’s what you want.

The leader and sweeper will try to keep the group together matching the reasonable
effort at the front and encouraging others to help the sweeper with those at the back.

Please use our "Sunday Club Ride" Discord voice channel here https://discord.com/channels/731107240987197461/1329849787687764079

name: NO LIMIT CC – SOCIAL SPIN - SURGE & SHARE
description:
👥 No Limit Cycling Club is a community-led cycling club built around consistency, confidence, and riding together. Riders of all backgrounds and abilities are welcome.

🌤 Surge & Share Socials is a steady group ride with short, controlled surges followed by regroups. Push during the surges if you want or stay with the beacon and ride steady. The aim is to share the road, support each other, and keep the group connected.

🗺 Routes rotate across Zwift worlds including Watopia, France, and Makuri Islands to keep rides fresh and fun.

🧭 Ride leads manage pacing and communication. Sweepers check in with riders and help regroup when needed.

🔒Warm-up around 1.5 w/kg, then settle into 1.8–2.2 w/kg. Fence is on to keep the group together and may be lifted during sprints and towards the end.

🎽 Ride with NLCC to unlock and wear the official No Limit CC Zwift kit.

🔁 Other NLCC rides
Tue 7:00 PM GMT
Thu 7:00 PM GMT
Sat 7:00 AM GMT

📲 Contact
NLCC on Zwift: https://www.zwift.com/clubs/469e53e5-462c-4aa7-b34c-026384533c0b/home
Strava: https://strava.app.link/Vq02OaxrDZb
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nolimit.bike

name: Stage 2: Pas Racing: Handful of Gravel
description:
The PAS Racing Gravel Series brings the spirit and style of Pas Normal Studios to gravel racing on Zwift. Across four stages, you’ll take on demanding routes in a series designed to be raced flat out. Get a shiny new gravel bike from the Drop Shop and let it rip!

Complete any stage to win a brand new Pas Normal Jersey!

Badges are out—XP is in. Every finish fuels your progress. Earn up to 2000 XP for completing the series, including a massive 1000 XP from Stage One.

Stage 1
Route: Jungle Circuit
Date: April 6–12

The series kicks off on the Jungle Circuit in Watopia.. Line up, find your rhythm, and open the PAS Racing Series strong.

Stage 2
Route: Handful of Gravel
Date: April 13–19

The challenge builds. Handful of Gravel rewards the right setup and steady power across demanding terrain. Upgrade your build, join the next start line, and keep the momentum rolling.

Stage 3
Route: Yumezi Grit
Date: April 20–26

A brand new gravel racing route on Zwift. Fresh terrain. New lines to chase. Take on Yumezi Grit, test yourself against the field, and experience competitive gravel at its best.

Stage 4
Route: Serpentine 8
Date: April 27 – May 3

One final chance to line up and close out the PAS Racing Series. Hard routes. Real racing. Finish it strong.

MONTHLY GC COMPETITION

Looking for extra motivation? The Monthly GC (General Classification) Competition lets you track your progress across all stages. Each race counts—your times add up throughout the series, shaping the overall standings. At the end of the month, the fastest total time takes the win!
VIEW RESULTS: https://www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/pasracing2026

—------------------

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that in order to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

name: TNP Sunday Social
description: Come for a gentle ride and chat with TNP on a Sunday morning - routes are upto 2 hours and rubber banded so all riders can go at there own pace. Ride leader will be around 2 - 2.5 wkg

name: ZZRC Bring a Bidon Social Ride
description:
Welcome to our ZZRC Bring a Bidon 2.4-2.7. This is a group ride, not a race, where we encourage riding together.

Our rides are open to all riders, the category enforcement merely allows us to ensure a safe and quality ride for you the riders and for our group.

In 2015 ZZRC was founded and are one of the oldest established clubs on Zwift .

YELLOW BEACON will pace between 2.4-2.7 on the ride , with a possible increase of watts on inclines or sprints , but the average for the whole ride will be as advertised

We strongly promote group riding so on most of our rides we will use the Fence to help encourage that. Using a fence ensures that the ride is not over paced .

In the event of falling off the back of the main group , you will need to pace well over group pace to bridge the gap and catch .

This is where our awesome ZZRC sweeps and Ride Buddies will help you return to group using their draft. They will give you clear encouraging instructions to aid this process .

Our crew are a caring bunch who dedicate a lot of hours to this club , but want you to have the best ride experience on Zwift

You will be fully supported and encouraged throughout the ride by the Leader, Sweeps and Ride Buddies .

Our rides do not allow the use of TT Bikes as they do not draft and will require you to push harder on the ride, and in these instances our Sweeps will not be able to help you .

Mountain bikes operate very similarly, minimum draft so more watts (effort) will be required for the ride and any chase backs to group .

All our rides have a 30 minute late join feature which allows you to rejoin if you have technical issues or you find yourself out of the group in the early stages of the ride. Using this feature SHOULD teleport you back into the main group with our YELLOW BEACON .


We love to have a chat on our rides so join us
on Discord: https://discord.gg/QdeS3PtXTX


TOP TIPS

1) Stay close to the ride leader (or just in front on climbs), don’t let a gap form and the elastic snap!

2) Stay away from the Fence – We don’t like to fry anyone

3) Most important of all . . . HAVE FUN AND ENJOY THE RIDE.

#zzrc

Don’t forget to join our ZZRC-We Pace Not Race Facebook page and our club on the companion app

eventSubgroups.name: ZZRC Bring a Bidon Social Ride (C)

name: The WATT Squad Sunday Smash
description:
Finish your week with strong watts on pure races of approximately 1h30.

Join other riders for challenging weekly races on various routes.
Sprinters, all-rounders, climbers you will need to unleash your watts on the perfect spot to go for victory.

To appear in the official results on ZwiftPower, it is mandatory to:

Be registered on ZwiftPower.
Use a heart rate monitor (HRM).
Connect a smart trainer or power meter as a power source. (Dual recording is encouraged).

Make sure you meet all requirements to avoid disqualification.

Join The Watt Squad in your Companion App and look for our other events as well. Interested in joining, then reach out to us on https://www.facebook.com/groups/thewattsquad

We are looking forward seeing you :-)
during the ride, you can join the discord channel with the following quick link: www.kaschper.de

name: Sunday 10K / HM Powered By NoblePro
description:
Sundays are for that long run....right?

As part of the NoblePro Running Club (NPRC) this is for those that save Sunday for a long run.

Join us for a 10K or half marathon but feel free to run whatever distance you like.

The pace is your own, there may be a run leader but feel free to run whatever you like. So lace up those shoes and hit the treadmill running.

name: Hercules - Sunday Long Run Social 15k
description:
Join our Sunday Long Run Social 15k - a super friendly and inclusive group run on Zwift!

You can walk, jog or race, everyone is welcome.

Expect great chat, good vibes, and a welcoming atmosphere for all runners, whether you're new to Zwift or a seasoned pro.

Please join our Zwift Club at https://www.zwift.com/uk/clubs/d6581e47-deb2-46ed-a278-5777d5d2fd0f/home

Please join our Facebook Group at https://www.facebook.com/groups/2606407819659263/

Please join us online at https://herculesrunningandtri.com/

Please join us on Strava at https://www.strava.com/clubs/herculesrunningandtriclub

If you would like to own our famous Pink & Black Club Kit in real life, please order at https://tinyurl.com/herculestrirun

name: Stage 2 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!


Stage 2
Route: Mayan San Remo
Date: March 16-23

Keep the prize wheels and bike wheels spinning as we move it over to Mayan San Remo for Stage 2.

name: T-VGN 🌱 Sprout & Sprint
description: Welcome to Team Vegan’s Sunday Sprout & Sprint race. This is a chance to test yourself with race events each week. Get ready to dig deep and push to the finish line!

name: TugaZ Ride
description:
Este é um evento sem líder, forme um grupo com ciclistas que queiram pedalar ao mesmo ritmo que você e aproveite para completarem o percurso juntos e desfrutarem de todo o efeito social que o Zwift nos traz.

A ideia do passeio é aumentar a sua resistência e capacidade, sempre em boa companhia.

This is a no leader event, form a group with cyclists who want to ride at the same pace as you and take the opportunity to complete the route together and enjoy all the social effect that Zwift brings us.

The idea of ​​the tour is to increase your resistance and capacity, always in good company.

name: DBR Sunday Race
description:
Welcome to DBR Sunday Race.
All will start with 1 minute between RS categories. Expect each race to be highly competitive and have fun.
Categories
Each race will be using Zwift Racing Score (ZRS) for categorization.
race up a category, if your RS is at the top end of a category. Or if you simply desire an added challenge.
- A: 1000 =< 690
- B:690<520
- C:520<350
- D:350<180
- E:180<=0
Your Zwift Racing Score is determined by how much success you have in races.
better against people with higher ZRS, then your ZRS may increase. If you place worse than people with lower ZRS, then your score might decrease. Read more about ZRS here - https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh <https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh>
If your ZRS increases past a category boundary during the series, your points earned will not transfer to the new category with you.
RULES:
Smart trainer or power meter is required. zPower will be removed.
Heart rate monitors are compulsory for all categories.
No TT bikes unless it's a TT event.
You need to have a registered account with Zwiftpower.com and accept their terms and conditions to be in the results of the race.
Misc.
Race organizers may request riders in all categories to provide a dual recording or a matching RL effort (Strava) in order to verify a Zwift race effort. Failure to comply may result in disqualification from the event. Failure to provide a dual recording or RL effort on three requests may result in disqualification from future events, until a dual recording with a matching effort is provided.
Race organizers may exclude a rider from the results, due to poor sportsmanship. Examples may be bad language, sandbagging or other behavior of a disruptive manner.

#danishbikeriders

name: Team RWB Z2 Endurance Ride
description:
Hi all, Autumn is now with us, so it's time to clean out the pain cave and get going on Zwift once more. We will be aiming to get everyone riding in their particular Zone 2 state.
Categories D, [1.5 to 2 w/kg] and C, [2 to 2.4 w/kg] will be led and swept where possible. Cat B will have to look after themselves, but that is rarely a problem.
Groupettos may form front and back, but we will encourage you to stick together. We want to avoid individuals getting isolated.
The fine details will be dealt with in the virtual chat.
The Irish are renowned for their "gift of the gab", so let's be hearing from you. It makes the time fly. You are welcome, one and all.

description: This is a no leader event. please group up with riders who wish to ride the same pace as you and enjoy the social effect of Zwift and complete the route together The idea of the ride is to build up your endurance in zone two, or blue in graph.

ride hard !!
